creator: dikshie@sfc.wide.ad.jp
text:
Sergey Matveychuk wrote:
> I'm afraid disabling mmap could decrease a performance dramatically.


i got:  ERROR: mmaping file 'udl.rrd': Cannot allocate memory
message in my cacti. udl.rrd file size is about 2 GBytes.
i found that disable mmap in rrdtool solve this problem.
i'm not good programmer so i dont know why disable mmap
solve this problem.
if the maintainer decided not to disable-mmap,
it's ok for me then i have to modify Makefile :)


regards,

-dikshie-
